---
# Copy blocks from this file into post .Rmd bodies.
# Rule: place ALL multimedia inside a .media-container wrapper (large / medium / small).
# Snippets file — not rendered as a post.
---

## Large container (960px) — Bilibili

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--large">
  <iframe
    src="https://player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV_ID&autoplay=0&danmaku=0&as_wide=1&high_quality=1"
    scrolling="no"
    frameborder="0"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    title="Video title"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```

## Medium container (640px) — YouTube

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--medium">
  <iframe
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID?autoplay=0"
    frameborder="0"
    allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
    allowfullscreen="true"
    title="Video title"
  ></iframe>
</div>
```

## Small container (400px) — image

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--small">
  <img src="figure.png" alt="Short description" />
</div>
```

## Small container (400px) — local HTML5 video

```{=html}
<div class="media-container media-container--small">
  <video controls preload="metadata" title="Clip title">
    <source src="clip.mp4" type="video/mp4" />
  </video>
</div>
```
